{{CargoOrgan
|name=Wing of Dracula
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10859
|idx=64
|description=These crimson wings exude the essence of vampirism. Legend holds that one sprouts them after receiving Dracula’s first bite—along with an insatiable thirst for blood…
|skill=
|hp=2282
|def=142
|atk=126
|rush=135
|gene1=Snail Arena, dodge rate +6%
|gene2=Per 5 Shrine Flying Objects shot, {race} RUSH +6
Shrine flying objects shot: 100/100
|gene3=Lifesteal Effect +10%
|gene4=In Snail Arena, Round 1 DMG +10%
|gene7=Lifesteal Effect +10% (Awakened)
|}}
